headline: Zelenskiy says he is thankful to Trump for advancing peace, to Macron for arranging summit and collaboration

Iraq restarts West Qurna 2 oilfield with output of about 150,000 bpd to boost southern output - Document and oilfield officials.
IRNA on MOU Text: After signing, Iran will take measures to the best of its ability to ensure safe passage of commercial ships between the Gulf and the Gulf of Oman.
IRNA on MOU Text: During this period, ships traffic will return to prewar levels.
Fed's Chair Warsh ends first press conference.
Trump ends remarks to reporters.
IRNA on MOU Text: The US is going to immediately start lifting the naval blockade on Iran after signing, complete end of blockade within 30 days.
Trump: I may put russian oil sanctions back on.
Trump: I didn't discuss Greenland at the G7, but I should.
Iraq increases Rumaila oilfield output by 300,000 bpd, reaching 650,000 bpd as export operations recover - Document and oilfield officials.
Trump on Iran: 60 days is not a hard deadline for a final agreement.
Irna on MOU Text: Iran will engage with Oman to determine future administration and maritime services in the Strait of Hormuz.
Iraq's Southern Crude output rises by about 500,000 bpd to 1.5 mln bpd as more tankers reach export terminals - Document and three oil officials.
Trump: I view the USMCA as possibly expiring immediately.
Trump: USMCA won't be sticking around. It gets terminated.
Trump: The US would do better without the USMCA agreement. I am thinking maybe we won't be able to make a deal. Would rather leave it unsigned.
